# bitwarden_user (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information on a Vaultwarden user account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "bitwarden_user" "alice" {
  email = "alice@example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String) User email.
- `id` (String) Identifier.
